message:
test(types): B11 wave 1 invariant tests for policy and symbol_set

policy.rs: +4 tests (fail_fast_aggregate_all_ok, collect_all_always_continues,
policy_action_display, fail_fast_aggregate_severity_lattice)
symbol_set.rs: +5 tests (remove_decrements_counts_and_memory,
concurrent_symbol_set_insert_and_threshold, ready_blocks_returns_threshold_blocks,
clear_resets_all_state, block_progress_tracking)
